title: PAIK Common Frontmatter
description: Fields required on the frontmatter of every PAIK document type. See SPEC.md section 2.

id.description: Stable kebab-case slug, unique within the project

last_updated.description: Date this document's content was last edited

last_verified.description: Optional: date this document's external links/references were last confirmed to still resolve. Distinct from last_updated, which tracks content edits.

owner_ref.description: Relative link to the owning team's document, e.g. team.md or teams/orders.md. Points at the whole file - team docs have no per-person anchor.

visibility.description: Who this document is safe to share with. The absence of secrets does not make a document public - on-call links, chat handles, hostnames, and DB topology are still internal-or-worse.

data_classification.description: Optional free-form classification tag for the kind of data this document references, e.g. operational, pii, financial
